description: Task corpus for ADR-067 A/B study: drift brief effectiveness. 20 realistic coding tasks across 4 Python repos, designed to touch at least one AVS/PFS/MDS/CCC/CIR signal scope. Used by scripts/brief_ab_study.py.
schema: task_id | repo_url | ref | task_description | target_files | seed | expected_signals

tasks.task_description: Fix the Session.request() method to correctly merge per-request headers with session-level headers instead of overwriting them. Ensure that removing a header (by passing None) works at both levels.

Add a RetryAdapter class in requests/adapters.py that wraps HTTPAdapter and automatically retries idempotent requests (GET, HEAD, OPTIONS, DELETE) up to a configurable max_retries count on connection errors.
Resolve the PreparedRequest.prepare_url() method incorrectly encoding IPv6 addresses in URLs. The fix must handle brackets around IPv6 literals and must not double-encode percent signs.

Extend the Response class with a from_cache property that returns True if the response was served from a local cache. Add a corresponding cache_info dict property that exposes cache age, source URL, and expiry.

Extract the cookie handling logic in requests/cookies.py into a separate CookiePolicy class. The new class must expose merge_cookies(), clear_expired(), and to_jar() methods. Existing callers in sessions.py must be updated.

Fix click.option() decorator to correctly pass is_eager=True through when the option is declared on a Command subclass. Currently is_eager is silently dropped when using class-based command definitions.

Add a RangeParamType to click/types.py that validates numeric parameters within a [min, max] interval and emits a clear error message showing the allowed range. Integrate it into click.option() as a direct shorthand via range=True.
Fix the Context.invoke() method to properly forward the obj parameter when calling nested commands. Currently obj is not passed down when the target command defines a different Context type via cls=.

Add shell completion support for zsh to click/shell_completion.py. The new ZshComplete class must inherit from ShellComplete and implement source_template and get_completion_args() to match the existing BashComplete structure.
Move the ANSI color helpers (style, unstyle, echo_via_pager) from click/utils.py into a new click/ansi.py module. Update all internal imports. The public API in click/__init__.py must be unchanged.
Fix FastAPI's dependency injection to correctly handle Annotated types with multiple metadata items. Currently only the first metadata item is used when resolving Depends() inside Annotated.

Add a rate_limit decorator to fastapi/routing.py that accepts requests_per_second and burst parameters and raises HTTP 429 when exceeded. The implementation must be middleware-compatible and must not break existing route registration.

Fix FastAPI's OpenAPI schema generation to correctly reflect optional query parameters declared as Optional[str] = None in route functions. Currently the generated schema incorrectly marks them as required.

Implement an APIRouter.prefix_tags() method in fastapi/routing.py that prepends a tag to all routes registered on the router. This should work when the router is included in an app with include_router().

Extract the request body validation logic from fastapi/dependencies/utils.py into a new BodyValidator class in fastapi/validators.py. The class must expose a validate() method and must be callable from the existing dependency resolution pipeline without breaking existing tests.
Fix pytest's --tb=short traceback formatter to not duplicate the file/line header when a test helper function and the test function itself are in the same file. Currently the header appears twice.
Add a --fail-on-warning flag to pytest's CLI in src/_pytest/config/__init__.py. When set, any warning captured during the test session causes pytest to exit with code 2 after the run completes.

Fix pytest's fixture finalization order when a session-scoped fixture depends on a module-scoped fixture. Currently teardown happens in the wrong order, leaving the session fixture finalized before its dependencies.

Implement a pytest.mark.timeout(seconds) marker in src/_pytest/timeout.py that raises a TimeoutError if a test exceeds the given duration. The implementation must use threading.Timer and must not affect non-marked tests.

Split pytest's Config class in src/_pytest/config/__init__.py by extracting all ini-file parsing methods into a new IniParser class in src/_pytest/config/iniparser.py. Config must delegate all ini calls to IniParser. Existing public API including get_ini_value() must remain unchanged.
